# 16th Note

---

Section 1: The 4s (8 Bars)
Each 1-beat pattern is repeated for a full measure.

Bar 1: 1000 1000 1000 1000 (Downbeat)
Bar 2: 0100 0100 0100 0100 (The "e")
Bar 3: 0010 0010 0010 0010 (The "&")
Bar 4: 0001 0001 0001 0001 (The "a")
Bar 5: 1100 1100 1100 1100 (Double: 1 & 2)
Bar 6: 0110 0110 0110 0110 (Double: 2 & 3)
Bar 7: 0011 0011 0011 0011 (Double: 3 & 4)
Bar 8: 1001 1001 1001 1001 (Double: 4 & 1)

Section 2: The 2s (8 Bars)
Each 1-beat pattern is repeated for 2 beats.
Bar 9: 1000 1000 0100 0100
Bar 10: 0010 0010 0001 0001
Bar 11: 1100 1100 0110 0110
Bar 12: 0011 0011 1001 1001
Bars 13-16: Repeat Bars 9-12 to complete the 8-bar block.

Section 3: The 1s (8 Bars)
Each 1-beat pattern changes every beat.
Bar 17: 1000 0100 0010 0001 (The "Waterfall")
Bar 18: 1100 0110 0011 1001 (The "Rotation")
Bars 19-24: Repeat the Bar 17 & 18 sequence three more times.

Section 4: Inverse / Complexity (8 Bars)
Adding "3-on-1-off" patterns to challenge your inner clock.
Bar 25: 1110 1110 1110 1110
Bar 26: 0111 0111 0111 0111
Bar 27: 1011 1011 1011 1011
Bar 28: 1101 1101 1101 1101
Bar 29: 1110 0111 1011 1101 (Moving the gap)
Bar 30: 1110 0111 1011 1101
Bar 31: 1111 1111 1111 1111 (Full accents / Burnout)
